title: Ein Walzer von Strauß
writer: Jacques Bachrach, Max Neufeld, Walter Reisch
actors: Eugen Neufeld, Tessy Harrison, Svet Petrovich, Max Sterenyi
plot: " A Waltz by Strauss" tells the story of Captain Lengsfelder, who returns to Vienna in 1923 after seven years of Siberian captivity. The city is alien to him, ownership and titles are lost,...
